dict.string: Speedwave needs access to Reminders to create and manage reminders via Claude Code.
Speedwave needs access to Calendar to view and create events via Claude Code.
Speedwave needs access to Contacts to look up email addresses for Claude Code.
Speedwave needs to send Apple Events to automate Mail, Notes, and other apps via Claude Code.
Speedwave needs access to your cloud storage files (OneDrive, iCloud Drive, Dropbox, Google Drive) to enable AI-powered editing in your workspace.
